answer: Flamingo aur Maina (FAM) is a boutique café and stays located in Jibhi, Himachal Pradesh, surrounded by an apple orchard, 1.5 acres of open land, and uninterrupted 360° mountain views. It’s a place where you can slow down, breathe deeply, and feel at home in the mountains.

You can find us at:

Opposite Forest Rest House,
Rashala,
Jibhi,
Himachal Pradesh 175123

Here’s the Google Maps location: https://www.google.com/maps?q=31.5787944,77.3668959

We have six beautiful rooms to choose from:

🦧 Flamingo 1 — Duplex, 4 Guests, ₹6,000 / night (incl. GST)
🦧 Flamingo 2 — King Attic, 4 Guests, ₹5,000 / night (incl. GST)
🦧 Flamingo 3 — Duplex, 4 Guests, ₹6,000 / night (incl. GST)
🐦 Maina 1 — Private Room, 2 Guests, ₹2,500 / night (incl. GST)
🐦 Maina 2 — Private Room, 2 Guests, ₹2,000 / night (incl. GST)
🐦 Maina 3 — Private Room, 2 Guests, ₹2,500 / night (incl. GST)

Each room has its own charm — from wooden duplexes with mountain views to cozy private rooms with garden access.

Here’s a quick overview of our prices (all inclusive of GST):

🦧 Flamingo 1 — ₹6,000 / night (Duplex, 4 Guests)
🦧 Flamingo 2 — ₹5,000 / night (King Attic, 4 Guests)
🦧 Flamingo 3 — ₹6,000 / night (Duplex, 4 Guests)
🐦 Maina 1 — ₹2,500 / night (Private, 2 Guests)
🐦 Maina 2 — ₹2,000 / night (Private, 2 Guests)
🐦 Maina 3 — ₹2,500 / night (Private, 2 Guests)

Each booking includes complimentary Wi-Fi, heater, electric blankets, and access to all common areas.

Flamingo 1 is our signature Duplex, perfect for 4 guests at ₹6,000 / night (incl. GST). It features a spacious two-level layout with a king bed, mountain-facing windows, a private sit-out area, Wi-Fi, heater, and bonfire access. It’s the most loved room at FAM.

Flamingo 2 is our charming King Attic, ideal for 4 guests at ₹5,000 / night (incl. GST). It features a cozy attic setup with a beautiful skylight — perfect for stargazing and romantic evenings. Comes with a king bed, heater, and bonfire access.

Flamingo 3 is a beautiful Duplex designed for 4 guests at ₹6,000 / night (incl. GST). It offers direct garden access, two beds, a heater, bonfire setup, and tea/coffee. Ideal for families or friends who want space and nature.

Maina 1 is a cozy Private Room for 2 guests at just ₹2,500 / night (incl. GST). It offers a queen bed, mountain views, Wi-Fi, and bonfire access. A warm and peaceful space for solo travellers or couples on a budget.

Maina 2 is our most affordable stay — a cosy Private Room for 2 guests at ₹2,000 / night (incl. GST). It features beautiful valley views, a queen bed, heater, and bonfire access. Perfect for the minimalist traveller.

Maina 3 is a charming Private Room for 2 guests at ₹2,500 / night (incl. GST). It features a queen bed, garden access, Wi-Fi, and bonfire access. Great value for travellers who want comfort without compromise.

For couples, I’d recommend Flamingo 2 — the King Attic (₹5,000/night). It has a beautiful skylight for stargazing and a cozy attic vibe that’s perfect for romance. Maina 1 (₹2,500/night) is also a lovely budget-friendly option with mountain views.

For families, Flamingo 1 (₹6,000/night) or Flamingo 3 (₹6,000/night) are both excellent choices. Both are duplex rooms that sleep 4 guests with 2 beds, have garden access, bonfire setup, and plenty of space for everyone to relax.

For friends travelling together, Flamingo 2 (₹5,000/night) and Flamingo 3 (₹6,000/night) are great picks. Flamingo 2 has a fun attic setup with a skylight, while Flamingo 3 offers garden access and more space. Both sleep 4 guests comfortably.
For solo travellers, Maina 1 (₹2,500/night) or Maina 2 (₹2,000/night) are wonderful choices. Both offer private, peaceful spaces with beautiful views — perfect for some quiet time in the mountains.

Yes! We offer High-Speed Wi-Fi throughout the property, making FAM a great place for workcations and remote work while enjoying the peaceful mountains.

Absolutely! Every room comes with a Heater and Electric Heating Blankets to keep you warm and snug during those chilly mountain evenings. We know mountain weather can be unpredictable, but we’ve got you covered.

Yes! We arrange evening bonfires under the stars — it’s one of our most loved experiences. Just let us know in advance and we’ll have everything set up with comfortable seating and the perfect mountain ambiance.
Yes, laundry service is available on demand. Just let our team know and we’ll take care of it for you.
Yes, we offer ironing facilities on demand. Simply let us know and we’ll arrange an iron and ironing board for you.

Absolutely! We can arrange cab services on demand from major nearby points:

🚕 Banjar to FAM
🚕 Bhuntar Airport (Kullu) to FAM (~50 km)

Just share your arrival details and we’ll coordinate everything for you.
Yes, we provide luggage assistance on demand. Our friendly staff will help you with your bags when you arrive and when you leave.

Yes! We can arrange a local Trek Guide on demand to help you explore the best trails around Jibhi — from the Serolsar Lake trek to the Jibhi Waterfall walk. Just let us know your preference and we’ll set it up!

Our boutique café serves freshly prepared comfort food in a peaceful mountain setting. From morning tea and hearty meals to evening snacks, everything is made with care using local ingredients. Just let us know what you’re craving!

FAM is a wonderful workcation destination. We offer:

📶 Reliable High-Speed Wi-Fi
🌿 Peaceful environment surrounded by nature
🏔️ Breathtaking mountain views from every corner
🛋️ Comfortable stays with all amenities

Many of our guests work remotely from here — just be warned, the mountain views might distract you!
Jibhi Waterfall is just a short walk from the property — about 500 metres or a 5-minute stroll through village paths. It’s the closest nature escape from FAM and absolutely beautiful year-round.
Jalori Pass is about 15 km from FAM, roughly a 45-minute drive. At 3,120 metres, it offers stunning panoramic views of the Himalayas. Best visited between March and June or September to November.

Serolsar Lake is a beautiful 2 km trek from Jalori Pass through enchanting forests of oak and rhododendron. The crystal-clear alpine lake at the end is absolutely worth the walk. Best from May to October.
Chehni Kothi is an ancient tower with stunning historic architecture, located in a heritage village about 8 km from FAM (25-minute drive). A beautiful step back in time through local village paths.

Mini Thailand is a hidden riverside paradise in Jibhi, about 2 km from FAM — just a 10-minute drive. Crystal-blue waters surrounded by boulders and pine trees make it perfect for a peaceful afternoon dip.

The Great Himalayan National Park is a UNESCO World Heritage Site about 35 km from FAM (~1 hour drive). It’s home to exotic wildlife, alpine meadows, and breathtaking Himalayan vistas. A must-visit for nature lovers.

Tirthan Valley is about 20 km from FAM, roughly a 30-minute drive. Known for trout fishing, riverside walks, and pristine natural beauty — it’s a serene escape into one of Himachal’s most picturesque valleys.
